stocks.impact_theory: Tesla announced a breakthrough in its Full Self-Driving (FSD) v13 software on April 22, 2026, with demos showing unsupervised driving capabilities. Economically, this accelerates EV adoption and robotaxi revenue projections to $100B by 2030. Market psychology: FOMO among retail investors, reminiscent of 2020 battery day surge. Historical parallel: NVDA's 2023 AI boom. Analogies: 1) Like iPhone launch catalyzing app economy; 2) Steam engine sparking industrial revolution.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment overwhelmingly positive (80% bullish posts via semantic search), web news from CNBC/Reuters highlight analyst upgrades to PT $350. High volume surge indicates momentum.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy/hold for 10-15% gains in 1 week; target $275.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory scrutiny on FSD, competition from Waymo, overvaluation if delivery misses.

stocks.justification: Strong news catalyst, high social buzz, technical breakout.

stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA reported Q1 FY2027 earnings beat on April 22, with data center revenue up 262% YoY due to AI demand. Implications: Sustains AI capex cycle, but supply constraints loom. Psychology: Validates AI hype, herd buying. Parallel: 2017 crypto mining boom. Analogies: 1) Oil rush in 1900s; 2) Dotcom infrastructure buildout.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings whisper beat, X posts praise CEO remarks on Blackwell chips; analysts raise targets to $160.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 8% upside; options play on volatility.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: China export bans, AI bubble burst, high valuation.

stocks.justification: Proven earnings track record, dominant market share.

stocks.impact_theory: EU court upholds $2B antitrust fine against Apple on App Store policies April 22, 2026. Economic hit: Potential 5-10% revenue loss from sideloading. Psychology: Fear of breakup, institutional selling. Parallel: 2020 Google fine impact. Analogies: 1) Breaking a monopoly like Standard Oil; 2) Dam bursting regulatory floodgates.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Negative X sentiment (60% bearish), headlines focus on compliance costs; downgrade risks.

stocks.justification: Regulatory uncertainty, but Apple resilience historically.

stocks.impact_theory: Boeing machinists' strike ends April 22, 2026, with new contract; production ramps to 38/month. Implications: Clears backlog, boosts cashflow. Psychology: Relief rally. Parallel: 2019 strike resolution +15% pop. Analogies: 1) Clearing airport backlog post-storm; 2) Oil pipeline unclogging.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Positive union vote on X, JPMorgan upgrade; backlog $520B intact.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst but ongoing safety concerns.

stocks.impact_theory: Bitcoin surges past $100K on ETF inflows and halving lag effects April 22, 2026. Coinbase benefits as top exchange. Implications: Trading fees up 50%. Psychology: Greed index spikes. Parallel: 2021 bull run. Analogies: 1) Gold rush saloons booming; 2) Casino during lottery fever.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Crypto X hype, volume leader; correlated to BTC +5%.

stocks.justification: High volatility in crypto sector tempers confidence.
